metadata.description: A-Level Mathematics topics with prerequisite ordering, colored by component
sources: Cambridge International AS & A Level Mathematics 9709 Syllabus

nodes.label: Solving Quadratic Equations
nodes.description: Solving quadratics by factorisation, completing the square and the quadratic formula

nodes.label: The Discriminant
nodes.description: Using the discriminant b^2 - 4ac to determine the nature and number of roots

nodes.label: Completing the Square
nodes.description: Writing quadratics in vertex form a(x-h)^2 + k, finding maximum/minimum values

nodes.label: Quadratic Graphs
nodes.description: Sketching parabolas, finding vertex, axis of symmetry and intersections with axes

nodes.label: Simultaneous Equations
nodes.description: Solving simultaneous equations where one is linear and one is quadratic

nodes.label: Quadratic Inequalities
nodes.description: Solving quadratic inequalities and representing solutions on a number line

nodes.label: Domain & Range
nodes.description: Understanding and finding the domain and range of functions

nodes.label: Composite Functions
nodes.description: Forming and evaluating composite functions fg(x) and gf(x)

nodes.label: Inverse Functions
nodes.description: Finding inverse functions, relationship between f and f^{-1}, reflection in y = x

nodes.label: Graph Transformations
nodes.description: Translations, reflections, stretches: y = f(x+a), y = f(ax), y = af(x), y = f(x)+a

nodes.label: Equations of Straight Lines
nodes.description: Gradient, y = mx + c, finding equations of lines, parallel and perpendicular lines

nodes.label: Distance & Midpoint
nodes.description: Distance between two points and midpoint of a line segment

nodes.label: Equation of a Circle
nodes.description: Standard and expanded form of circle equations, finding centre and radius

nodes.label: Intersection of Lines & Circles
nodes.description: Finding intersection points of lines and circles, tangent to a circle

nodes.label: Radians
nodes.description: Definition of a radian, converting between degrees and radians

nodes.label: Arc Length & Sector Area
nodes.description: Calculating arc length s = r*theta and sector area A = 0.5*r^2*theta

nodes.label: Trigonometric Ratios
nodes.description: Exact values of sin, cos and tan for standard angles, the unit circle

nodes.label: Trigonometric Identities (AS)
nodes.description: tan(x) = sin(x)/cos(x), sin^2(x) + cos^2(x) = 1 and their applications

nodes.label: Trigonometric Equations (AS)
nodes.description: Solving trigonometric equations in given intervals, principal and secondary values

nodes.label: Trigonometric Graphs
nodes.description: Graphs of sin, cos, tan and their transformations, amplitude and period

nodes.label: Arithmetic Progressions
nodes.description: nth term, sum of n terms, common difference, applications of AP

nodes.label: Geometric Progressions
nodes.description: nth term, sum of n terms, common ratio, sum to infinity for convergent GP

nodes.label: Binomial Expansion (Positive Integer)
nodes.description: Expansion of (a + b)^n for positive integer n using Pascal's triangle and nCr

nodes.label: Differentiation: Power Rule
nodes.description: Differentiating x^n, sums and differences of polynomials, gradient of a curve

nodes.label: Tangents & Normals
nodes.description: Finding equations of tangent and normal lines to a curve at a given point

nodes.label: Stationary Points
nodes.description: Finding and classifying stationary points using first and second derivatives

nodes.label: Connected Rates of Change
nodes.description: Using the chain rule dy/dt = dy/dx * dx/dt for related rates problems

nodes.label: Increasing & Decreasing Functions
nodes.description: Using the sign of the derivative to determine where a function is increasing or decreasing

nodes.label: Indefinite Integration
nodes.description: Integration as the reverse of differentiation, integrating x^n, constant of integration

nodes.label: Definite Integration
nodes.description: Evaluating definite integrals, the fundamental theorem of calculus

nodes.label: Area Under a Curve
nodes.description: Using definite integration to find areas under curves and between curves

nodes.label: Volume of Revolution (AS)
nodes.description: Finding volumes of revolution about the x-axis and y-axis using integration

nodes.label: Modulus Function
nodes.description: Definition of |x|, graphs of modulus functions, solving modulus equations and inequalities

nodes.label: Factor & Remainder Theorem
nodes.description: Using the factor theorem to factorise polynomials and the remainder theorem

nodes.label: Polynomial Division
nodes.description: Dividing polynomials by linear and quadratic expressions

nodes.label: Partial Fractions
nodes.description: Decomposing rational expressions into partial fractions including repeated and quadratic factors

nodes.label: Exponential Functions
nodes.description: Properties and graphs of e^x and a^x, exponential growth and decay models

nodes.label: Logarithms
nodes.description: Definition of logarithms, laws of logarithms, change of base, natural logarithm ln

nodes.label: Solving Exponential Equations
nodes.description: Using logarithms to solve equations of the form a^x = b, reducing to linear form

nodes.label: Reducing to Linear Form
nodes.description: Using logarithms to reduce y = ax^n and y = Ab^x to straight-line form

nodes.label: Addition Formulae
nodes.description: sin(A +/- B), cos(A +/- B), tan(A +/- B) and their proofs and applications

nodes.label: Double Angle Formulae
nodes.description: sin(2A), cos(2A), tan(2A) and their use in solving equations and proving identities

nodes.label: Harmonic Form (R-formula)
nodes.description: Expressing a*sin(x) + b*cos(x) in the form R*sin(x + alpha) or R*cos(x + alpha)

nodes.label: Chain Rule
nodes.description: Differentiating composite functions using the chain rule dy/dx = dy/du * du/dx

nodes.label: Product Rule
nodes.description: Differentiating products of functions: d/dx(uv) = u*dv/dx + v*du/dx

nodes.label: Quotient Rule
nodes.description: Differentiating quotients of functions: d/dx(u/v) = (v*du/dx - u*dv/dx)/v^2

nodes.label: Differentiating e^x and ln(x)
nodes.description: Derivatives of e^(f(x)) and ln(f(x)), applications to growth and decay

nodes.label: Differentiating Trigonometric Functions
nodes.description: Derivatives of sin(x), cos(x), tan(x) and their composites

nodes.label: Implicit Differentiation
nodes.description: Differentiating equations not explicitly in the form y = f(x)

nodes.label: Parametric Differentiation
nodes.description: Finding dy/dx from parametric equations using dy/dx = (dy/dt)/(dx/dt)

nodes.label: Integration of e^x & Trig Functions
nodes.description: Integrating e^(ax+b), sin(ax+b), cos(ax+b), sec^2(ax+b) and 1/x

nodes.label: Integration by Substitution
nodes.description: Using substitution to simplify and evaluate integrals, reverse chain rule

nodes.label: Integration by Parts
nodes.description: Using the formula integral(u dv) = uv - integral(v du), repeated integration by parts

nodes.label: Integration Using Partial Fractions
nodes.description: Integrating rational functions by decomposing into partial fractions

nodes.label: Trapezium Rule
nodes.description: Numerical integration using the trapezium rule, estimating errors

nodes.label: Location of Roots
nodes.description: Using sign-change methods and graphical approaches to locate roots of equations

nodes.label: Iterative Methods
nodes.description: Solving equations using iterative formulae x_{n+1} = g(x_n), convergence and divergence

nodes.label: Binomial Expansion (Rational Powers)
nodes.description: Expansion of (1 + x)^n for rational n, validity condition |x| < 1

nodes.label: Partial Fractions (Advanced)
nodes.description: Partial fractions with repeated factors and use in binomial expansions

nodes.label: Modulus Inequalities
nodes.description: Solving inequalities involving modulus functions, algebraic and graphical methods

nodes.label: Exponential Growth & Decay Models
nodes.description: Modelling with exponential functions, fitting models to data using logarithms

nodes.label: sec, cosec & cot
nodes.description: Definitions, graphs and identities for sec, cosec and cot, including 1 + tan^2 = sec^2

nodes.label: Inverse Trigonometric Functions
nodes.description: Definitions, domains, ranges and graphs of arcsin, arccos and arctan

nodes.label: Trigonometric Identities (Advanced)
nodes.description: Proving and using identities involving sec, cosec, cot and double angle results

nodes.label: Differentiation of Inverse Trig
nodes.description: Derivatives of arcsin(x), arccos(x), arctan(x) and related composite functions

nodes.label: Further Parametric Differentiation
nodes.description: Finding second derivatives and tangent/normal equations from parametric forms

nodes.label: Integration Yielding Inverse Trig
nodes.description: Recognising and evaluating integrals that give arcsin or arctan results

nodes.label: Integration Using Trig Identities
nodes.description: Using trigonometric identities to integrate sin^2, cos^2, tan^2 and products

nodes.label: Numerical Methods (P3)
nodes.description: Sign-change, iterative methods, use of technology, convergence of sequences

nodes.label: Vectors in 2D & 3D
nodes.description: Position vectors, magnitude, unit vectors, addition and scalar multiplication in 2D/3D

nodes.label: Scalar (Dot) Product
nodes.description: Calculating a.b, finding angles between vectors, perpendicularity condition

nodes.label: Vector Equation of a Line
nodes.description: r = a + t*b, finding equations of lines, intersection and skewness of lines

nodes.label: Vector Equation of a Plane
nodes.description: Equation of a plane in scalar product form r.n = d, distance from point to plane

nodes.label: Vector (Cross) Product
nodes.description: Calculating a x b, geometric interpretation, area of triangle and parallelogram

nodes.label: Separation of Variables
nodes.description: Solving first-order ODEs by separating variables, general and particular solutions

nodes.label: Modelling with Differential Equations
nodes.description: Formulating and solving differential equations for real-world problems

nodes.label: Complex Number Arithmetic
nodes.description: Addition, subtraction, multiplication, division, conjugates of complex numbers

nodes.label: Argand Diagrams
nodes.description: Representing complex numbers on the Argand diagram, geometric interpretation

nodes.label: Modulus-Argument Form
nodes.description: Polar form r(cos(theta) + i*sin(theta)), conversion between forms

nodes.label: Loci in the Complex Plane
nodes.description: Loci defined by |z - a| = r, |z - a| = |z - b|, arg(z - a) = theta

nodes.label: Complex Roots of Polynomials
nodes.description: Conjugate root theorem, solving polynomial equations with complex roots

nodes.label: Histograms
nodes.description: Drawing and interpreting histograms for grouped continuous data, frequency density

nodes.label: Cumulative Frequency & Box Plots
nodes.description: Cumulative frequency diagrams, box-and-whisker plots, quartiles, outliers

nodes.label: Stem-and-Leaf Diagrams
nodes.description: Constructing and interpreting stem-and-leaf diagrams, back-to-back comparisons

nodes.label: Measures of Central Tendency
nodes.description: Mean, median and mode for raw, grouped and frequency data

nodes.label: Measures of Spread
nodes.description: Range, interquartile range, variance and standard deviation for raw and grouped data

nodes.label: Permutations
nodes.description: Arrangements of objects, factorial notation, permutations with restrictions

nodes.label: Combinations
nodes.description: Selections of objects, nCr notation, combinations with restrictions

nodes.label: Basic Probability
nodes.description: Sample spaces, equally likely outcomes, addition and multiplication rules

nodes.label: Conditional Probability
nodes.description: P(A|B), independent events, tree diagrams, Venn diagrams, probability tables

nodes.label: Probability Distributions
nodes.description: Constructing probability distributions for discrete random variables

nodes.label: Expectation & Variance
nodes.description: E(X) and Var(X) for discrete random variables, E(aX + b), Var(aX + b)

nodes.label: Binomial Distribution
nodes.description: Conditions for B(n,p), calculating P(X = r), mean and variance np, npq

nodes.label: Standard Normal Distribution
nodes.description: Z ~ N(0,1), using normal tables, standardisation z = (x - mu)/sigma

nodes.label: Normal Probability Calculations
nodes.description: Finding probabilities and values for X ~ N(mu, sigma^2), inverse normal problems

nodes.label: Normal Approximation to Binomial
nodes.description: Using N(np, npq) to approximate B(n, p) when n is large, continuity correction

nodes.label: Poisson Distribution
nodes.description: Conditions for Poisson, P(X = r) = e^(-lambda)*lambda^r / r!, mean = variance = lambda

nodes.label: Sum of Poisson Variables
nodes.description: If X ~ Po(a) and Y ~ Po(b) independently, then X + Y ~ Po(a + b)

nodes.label: Poisson Approximation to Binomial
nodes.description: Using Po(np) to approximate B(n, p) when n is large and p is small

nodes.label: E(aX + bY)
nodes.description: Expectation of linear combinations of independent random variables

nodes.label: Var(aX + bY)
nodes.description: Variance of linear combinations of independent random variables

nodes.label: Probability Density Functions
nodes.description: Definition of PDF, properties, relationship to CDF, finding probabilities

nodes.label: E(X) & Var(X) for Continuous RVs
nodes.description: Calculating expectation and variance using integration for continuous random variables

nodes.label: Median & Quartiles of Continuous RVs
nodes.description: Finding median and quartiles by solving integral(f(x)) = 0.5 or 0.25/0.75

nodes.label: Continuous Uniform Distribution
nodes.description: Properties of U(a, b), PDF, mean and variance of the uniform distribution

nodes.label: Sampling & Sampling Methods
nodes.description: Population and sample, random sampling, unbiased estimators for mean and variance

nodes.label: Sampling Distribution of the Mean
nodes.description: Distribution of sample mean, Central Limit Theorem, standard error

nodes.label: Confidence Intervals
nodes.description: Confidence intervals for population mean (known variance), interpretation

nodes.label: Hypothesis Testing for a Mean
nodes.description: One-sample z-test for population mean, null/alternative hypotheses, significance levels

nodes.label: Hypothesis Testing for Poisson
nodes.description: Testing the mean of a Poisson distribution, critical values and p-values

nodes.label: Hypothesis Testing for Proportion
nodes.description: Testing a population proportion using the binomial distribution

nodes.label: Type I & Type II Errors
nodes.description: Definitions of Type I and Type II errors, calculating their probabilities

nodes.label: Force Diagrams
nodes.description: Drawing and interpreting force diagrams showing weight, normal reaction, friction, tension

nodes.label: Resolving Forces
nodes.description: Resolving forces into horizontal and vertical components, inclined planes

nodes.label: Equilibrium of a Particle
nodes.description: Conditions for equilibrium, resolving in two perpendicular directions, triangle of forces

nodes.label: Friction
nodes.description: Coefficient of friction, F <= mu*R, limiting friction, rough surfaces

nodes.label: Displacement, Velocity & Acceleration
nodes.description: Definitions of displacement, velocity and acceleration as vectors/scalars, sign conventions

nodes.label: SUVAT Equations
nodes.description: Using the five constant acceleration equations: v = u + at, s = ut + 0.5at^2, etc.

nodes.label: Velocity-Time Graphs
nodes.description: Interpreting velocity-time graphs, gradient = acceleration, area = displacement

nodes.label: Vertical Motion Under Gravity
nodes.description: Free-fall problems, projectile dropped or thrown vertically, g = 10 or 9.8 m/s^2

nodes.label: Variable Acceleration
nodes.description: Using differentiation and integration when acceleration varies with time, v = ds/dt, a = dv/dt

nodes.label: Newton's First Law
nodes.description: A body remains at rest or in uniform motion unless acted on by a resultant force

nodes.label: Newton's Second Law (F = ma)
nodes.description: Applying F = ma to find resultant force, acceleration or mass; motion on inclines

nodes.label: Newton's Third Law
nodes.description: Action and reaction pairs, identifying force pairs in connected systems

nodes.label: Connected Particles & Pulleys
nodes.description: Particles connected by strings over pulleys, Atwood machines, acceleration of system

nodes.label: Motion on Inclined Planes
nodes.description: Resolving weight on a slope, acceleration on smooth and rough inclines

nodes.label: Work Done by a Force
nodes.description: Work = Force x distance in direction of force, work done against friction and gravity

nodes.label: Kinetic & Potential Energy
nodes.description: KE = 0.5mv^2, PE = mgh, conservation of energy principle

nodes.label: Power
nodes.description: Power = Force x velocity, P = Fv, driving force and resistance, maximum speed

nodes.label: Work-Energy Principle
nodes.description: Net work done = change in kinetic energy, solving problems using energy methods
